title: Rudsgrendi

infobox.value: This [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Rudsgrendi&action=edit).

or **Rugsgrend**[[2]](#cite_note-2) is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located on the western shore of the large lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"), halfway between the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)") and the town of [Rjukan](/wiki/Rjukan "Rjukan"). On the opposite side of the lake lies the village of [Hovin](/wiki/Hovin,_Tinn "Hovin, Tinn"). The village of [Tinnoset](/wiki/Tinnoset "Tinnoset") lies about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the south.

Jukvam, Dag (1999). ["Historisk oversikt over endringer i kommune- og fylkesinndelingen"](http://www.ssb.no/emner/00/90/rapp_9913/rapp_9913.pdf) (PDF) (in Norwegian). [Statistisk sentralbyrå](/wiki/Statistics_Norway "Statistics Norway"). [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [9788253746845](/wiki/Special:BookSources/9788253746845 "Special:BookSources/9788253746845").

**Rudsgrendi** or **Rugsgrend**[[2]](#cite_note-2) is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located on the western shore of the large lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"), halfway between the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)") and the town of [Rjukan](/wiki/Rjukan "Rjukan"). On the opposite side of the lake lies the village of [Hovin](/wiki/Hovin,_Tinn "Hovin, Tinn"). The village of [Tinnoset](/wiki/Tinnoset "Tinnoset") lies about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the south.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rudsgrendi&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

In the mid-nineteenth century Rudsgrendi was administratively a part of [Tinn](/wiki/Tinn "Tinn"), but the area became a part of the new [Gransherad Municipality](/wiki/Gransherad_Municipality "Gransherad Municipality") in 1860. In 1886, the [Hovin](/wiki/Hovin,_Telemark "Hovin, Telemark") area was separated from Gransherad to form a new municipality of its own. Rudsgrendi was part of Hovin from 1886 until 1 January 1964, when it, together with Gransherad, became a part of [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality"). At that time, Rudsgrendi had 21 inhabitants.[[3]](#cite_note-Dag-3)
